collaboration_actions_sequence_check.name: collaboration_actions_sequence_check
collaboration_actions_sequence_check.value:
typeof("collaboration_actions"."base_head_seq") = 'integer' and "collaboration_actions"."base_head_seq" between 0 and 9007199254740991
        and ("collaboration_actions"."applied_head_seq" is null or (
          typeof("collaboration_actions"."applied_head_seq") = 'integer'
          and "collaboration_actions"."applied_head_seq" between 0 and 9007199254740991
          and "collaboration_actions"."applied_head_seq" >= "collaboration_actions"."base_head_seq"
        ))

collaboration_actions_state_check.name: collaboration_actions_state_check
collaboration_actions_state_check.value:
("collaboration_actions"."status" = 'pending' and "collaboration_actions"."applied_head_seq" is null and "collaboration_actions"."failure_category" is null)
        or ("collaboration_actions"."status" = 'applied' and "collaboration_actions"."applied_head_seq" is not null and "collaboration_actions"."failure_category" is null)
        or ("collaboration_actions"."status" = 'failed' and "collaboration_actions"."applied_head_seq" is null and "collaboration_actions"."failure_category" is not null)

collaboration_actions_command_id_check.name: collaboration_actions_command_id_check
collaboration_actions_command_id_check.value:
typeof("collaboration_actions"."command_id") = 'text'
        and "collaboration_actions"."command_id" = trim("collaboration_actions"."command_id", char(9) || char(10) || char(11) || char(12) || char(13) || char(160) || ' ')
        and length(cast("collaboration_actions"."command_id" as blob)) between 1 and 256

collaboration_actions_failure_category_c.name: collaboration_actions_failure_category_check
collaboration_actions_failure_category_c.value:
"collaboration_actions"."failure_category" is null or (
        typeof("collaboration_actions"."failure_category") = 'text'
        and "collaboration_actions"."failure_category" = trim("collaboration_actions"."failure_category", char(9) || char(10) || char(13) || ' ')
        and length(cast("collaboration_actions"."failure_category" as blob)) between 1 and 128
      )

collaboration_ai_run_snapshots_sequence_.name: collaboration_ai_run_snapshots_sequence_check
collaboration_ai_run_snapshots_sequence_.value:
typeof("collaboration_ai_run_snapshots"."generation") = 'integer' and "collaboration_ai_run_snapshots"."generation" between 1 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("collaboration_ai_run_snapshots"."head_seq") = 'integer' and "collaboration_ai_run_snapshots"."head_seq" between 0 and 9007199254740991

collaboration_command_delivery_jobs_sequ.name: collaboration_command_delivery_jobs_sequence_check
collaboration_command_delivery_jobs_sequ.value:
typeof("collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."generation") = 'integer'
        and "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."generation" between 1 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."seq") = 'integer'
        and "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."seq" between 1 and 9007199254740991

collaboration_command_delivery_jobs_retr.name: collaboration_command_delivery_jobs_retry_state_check
collaboration_command_delivery_jobs_retr.value:
(
          "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."status" = 'pending'
          and typeof("collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."attempts") = 'integer'
          and "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."attempts" between 0 and 4
          and typeof("collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."next_attempt_at") = 'integer'
          and "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."next_attempt_at" >= "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."created_at"
          and (
            ("collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."attempts" = 0 and "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."failure_category" is null)
            or ("collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."attempts" > 0 and "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."failure_category" = 'delivery_failed')
          )
        ) or (
          "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."status" = 'exhausted'
          and "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."attempts" = 5
          and "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."next_attempt_at" is null
          and "collaboration_command_delivery_jobs"."failure_category" = 'delivery_failed'
        )

collaboration_document_changes_sequence_.name: collaboration_document_changes_sequence_check
collaboration_document_changes_sequence_.value:
typeof("collaboration_document_changes"."generation") = 'integer' and "collaboration_document_changes"."generation" between 1 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("collaboration_document_changes"."base_head_seq") = 'integer' and "collaboration_document_changes"."base_head_seq" between 0 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("collaboration_document_changes"."forward_seq") = 'integer' and "collaboration_document_changes"."forward_seq" between 1 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("collaboration_document_changes"."resulting_head_seq") = 'integer'
        and "collaboration_document_changes"."resulting_head_seq" between 1 and 9007199254740991
        and "collaboration_document_changes"."forward_seq" > "collaboration_document_changes"."base_head_seq"
        and "collaboration_document_changes"."resulting_head_seq" >= "collaboration_document_changes"."forward_seq"

collaboration_document_changes_relative_.name: collaboration_document_changes_relative_positions_check
collaboration_document_changes_relative_.value:
typeof("collaboration_document_changes"."affected_start_relative") = 'blob'
        and length("collaboration_document_changes"."affected_start_relative") between 1 and 65536
        and typeof("collaboration_document_changes"."affected_end_relative") = 'blob'
        and length("collaboration_document_changes"."affected_end_relative") between 1 and 65536

collaboration_documents_sequence_check.name: collaboration_documents_sequence_check
collaboration_documents_sequence_check.value:
typeof("collaboration_documents"."head_seq") = 'integer' and "collaboration_documents"."head_seq" between 0 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("collaboration_documents"."checkpoint_seq") = 'integer' and "collaboration_documents"."checkpoint_seq" between 0 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("collaboration_documents"."projected_seq") = 'integer' and "collaboration_documents"."projected_seq" between 0 and 9007199254740991
        and "collaboration_documents"."checkpoint_seq" <= "collaboration_documents"."projected_seq"
        and "collaboration_documents"."projected_seq" <= "collaboration_documents"."head_seq"

collaboration_noop_receipts_sequence_che.name: collaboration_noop_receipts_sequence_check
collaboration_noop_receipts_sequence_che.value:
typeof("collaboration_noop_receipts"."generation") = 'integer' and "collaboration_noop_receipts"."generation" between 1 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("collaboration_noop_receipts"."head_seq") = 'integer' and "collaboration_noop_receipts"."head_seq" between 0 and 9007199254740991

collaboration_noop_receipts_idempotency_.name: collaboration_noop_receipts_idempotency_key_check
collaboration_noop_receipts_idempotency_.value:
typeof("collaboration_noop_receipts"."idempotency_key") = 'text'
        and "collaboration_noop_receipts"."idempotency_key" = trim("collaboration_noop_receipts"."idempotency_key", char(9) || char(10) || char(11) || char(12) || char(13) || char(160) || ' ')
        and length(cast("collaboration_noop_receipts"."idempotency_key" as blob)) between 1 and 256

collaboration_noop_receipts_audit_identi.name: collaboration_noop_receipts_audit_identity_check
collaboration_noop_receipts_audit_identi.value:
("collaboration_noop_receipts"."principal_id" is null or (
          typeof("collaboration_noop_receipts"."principal_id") = 'text'
          and "collaboration_noop_receipts"."principal_id" = trim("collaboration_noop_receipts"."principal_id", char(9) || char(10) || char(11) || char(12) || char(13) || char(160) || ' ')
          and length(cast("collaboration_noop_receipts"."principal_id" as blob)) between 1 and 256
        )) and ("collaboration_noop_receipts"."request_id" is null or (
          typeof("collaboration_noop_receipts"."request_id") = 'text'
          and "collaboration_noop_receipts"."request_id" = trim("collaboration_noop_receipts"."request_id", char(9) || char(10) || char(11) || char(12) || char(13) || char(160) || ' ')
          and length(cast("collaboration_noop_receipts"."request_id" as blob)) between 1 and 256
        )) and ("collaboration_noop_receipts"."session_id" is null or (
          typeof("collaboration_noop_receipts"."session_id") = 'text'
          and "collaboration_noop_receipts"."session_id" = trim("collaboration_noop_receipts"."session_id", char(9) || char(10) || char(11) || char(12) || char(13) || char(160) || ' ')
          and length(cast("collaboration_noop_receipts"."session_id" as blob)) between 1 and 256
        )) and ("collaboration_noop_receipts"."semantic_action_id" is null or (
          typeof("collaboration_noop_receipts"."semantic_action_id") = 'text'
          and "collaboration_noop_receipts"."semantic_action_id" = trim("collaboration_noop_receipts"."semantic_action_id", char(9) || char(10) || char(11) || char(12) || char(13) || char(160) || ' ')
          and length(cast("collaboration_noop_receipts"."semantic_action_id" as blob)) between 1 and 256
        ))

collaboration_proposal_anchors_sequence_.name: collaboration_proposal_anchors_sequence_check
collaboration_proposal_anchors_sequence_.value:
typeof("collaboration_proposal_anchors"."generation") = 'integer' and "collaboration_proposal_anchors"."generation" between 1 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("collaboration_proposal_anchors"."base_head_seq") = 'integer'
        and "collaboration_proposal_anchors"."base_head_seq" between 0 and 9007199254740991

collaboration_proposal_anchors_relative_.name: collaboration_proposal_anchors_relative_positions_check
collaboration_proposal_anchors_relative_.value:
typeof("collaboration_proposal_anchors"."start_relative") = 'blob'
        and length("collaboration_proposal_anchors"."start_relative") between 1 and 65536
        and typeof("collaboration_proposal_anchors"."end_relative") = 'blob'
        and length("collaboration_proposal_anchors"."end_relative") between 1 and 65536

collaboration_room_closure_jobs_retry_st.name: collaboration_room_closure_jobs_retry_state_check
collaboration_room_closure_jobs_retry_st.value:
(
          "collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."status" = 'pending'
          and typeof("collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."attempts") = 'integer'
          and "collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."attempts" between 0 and 4
          and typeof("collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."next_attempt_at") = 'integer'
          and "collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."next_attempt_at" >= "collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."created_at"
          and (
            ("collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."attempts" = 0 and "collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."failure_category" is null)
            or ("collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."attempts" > 0 and "collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."failure_category" = 'delivery_failed')
          )
        ) or (
          "collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."status" = 'exhausted'
          and "collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."attempts" = 5
          and "collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."next_attempt_at" is null
          and "collaboration_room_closure_jobs"."failure_category" = 'delivery_failed'
        )

collaboration_updates_sequence_check.name: collaboration_updates_sequence_check
collaboration_updates_sequence_check.value:
typeof("collaboration_updates"."generation") = 'integer' and "collaboration_updates"."generation" between 1 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("collaboration_updates"."seq") = 'integer' and "collaboration_updates"."seq" between 1 and 9007199254740991

collaboration_updates_idempotency_key_ch.name: collaboration_updates_idempotency_key_check
collaboration_updates_idempotency_key_ch.value:
typeof("collaboration_updates"."idempotency_key") = 'text'
        and "collaboration_updates"."idempotency_key" = trim("collaboration_updates"."idempotency_key", char(9) || char(10) || char(11) || char(12) || char(13) || char(160) || ' ')
        and length(cast("collaboration_updates"."idempotency_key" as blob)) between 1 and 256

collaboration_updates_diagnostic_json_ch.name: collaboration_updates_diagnostic_json_check
collaboration_updates_diagnostic_json_ch.value:
"collaboration_updates"."diagnostic_json" is null or (
        typeof("collaboration_updates"."diagnostic_json") = 'text'
        and length(cast("collaboration_updates"."diagnostic_json" as blob)) between 2 and 4096
        and case when json_valid("collaboration_updates"."diagnostic_json")
          then json_type("collaboration_updates"."diagnostic_json") = 'object'
          else 0
        end
      )

collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs.name: collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs_version_check
collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs.value:
typeof("collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."generation") = 'integer'
        and "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."generation" between 1 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."workflow_revision") = 'integer'
        and "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."workflow_revision" between 1 and 9007199254740991

collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs.name: collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs_retry_state_check
collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs.value:
(
          "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."status" = 'pending'
          and typeof("collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."attempts") = 'integer'
          and "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."attempts" between 0 and 4
          and typeof("collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."next_attempt_at") = 'integer'
          and "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."next_attempt_at" >= "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."created_at"
          and (
            ("collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."attempts" = 0 and "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."failure_category" is null)
            or ("collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."attempts" > 0 and "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."failure_category" = 'delivery_failed')
          )
        ) or (
          "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."status" = 'exhausted'
          and "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."attempts" = 5
          and "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."next_attempt_at" is null
          and "collaboration_workflow_notification_jobs"."failure_category" = 'delivery_failed'
        )

document_approvals_sequence_check.name: document_approvals_sequence_check
document_approvals_sequence_check.value:
typeof("document_approvals"."generation") = 'integer' and "document_approvals"."generation" between 1 and 9007199254740991
        and typeof("document_approvals"."approved_head_seq") = 'integer'
        and "document_approvals"."approved_head_seq" between 0 and 9007199254740991

document_approvals_invalidation_check.name: document_approvals_invalidation_check
document_approvals_invalidation_check.value:
("document_approvals"."invalidated_seq" is null and "document_approvals"."invalidated_principal_id" is null and "document_approvals"."invalidated_at" is null)
        or ("document_approvals"."invalidated_seq" is not null and "document_approvals"."invalidated_principal_id" is not null
          and "document_approvals"."invalidated_at" is not null
          and typeof("document_approvals"."invalidated_seq") = 'integer'
          and "document_approvals"."invalidated_seq" between 1 and 9007199254740991
          and "document_approvals"."invalidated_seq" > "document_approvals"."approved_head_seq")

document_approvals_revocation_check.name: document_approvals_revocation_check
document_approvals_revocation_check.value:
(
          "document_approvals"."revoked_at" is null
          and "document_approvals"."revoked_principal_id" is null
          and "document_approvals"."revoked_request_id" is null
        ) or (
          "document_approvals"."revoked_at" is not null
          and typeof("document_approvals"."revoked_at") = 'integer'
          and "document_approvals"."revoked_at" >= "document_approvals"."approved_at"
          and typeof("document_approvals"."revoked_principal_id") = 'text'
          and "document_approvals"."revoked_principal_id" = trim(
            "document_approvals"."revoked_principal_id",
            char(9) || char(10) || char(11) || char(12) || char(13) || char(160) || ' '
          )
          and length(cast("document_approvals"."revoked_principal_id" as blob)) between 1
            and 256
          and typeof("document_approvals"."revoked_request_id") = 'text'
          and "document_approvals"."revoked_request_id" = trim(
            "document_approvals"."revoked_request_id",
            char(9) || char(10) || char(11) || char(12) || char(13) || char(160) || ' '
          )
          and length(cast("document_approvals"."revoked_request_id" as blob)) between 1
            and 256
          and "document_approvals"."invalidated_seq" is null
          and "document_approvals"."invalidated_principal_id" is null
          and "document_approvals"."invalidated_at" is null
        )

document_changes_batch_id_check.name: document_changes_batch_id_check
document_changes_batch_id_check.value: ("document_changes"."kind" = 'single' and "document_changes"."batch_id" is null) or ("document_changes"."kind" = 'batch' and "document_changes"."batch_id" is not null)
